summary: Completed end-to-end testing of pastry management system (gestionale pasticceria). Backend APIs fully functional, frontend UI loads correctly with mixed content security issues preventing API integration.

integration_issues.issue: Mixed Content Security Policy blocking HTTP API calls from HTTPS frontend
integration_issues.details: Frontend served over HTTPS but making HTTP requests to backend APIs, blocked by browser security policy

integration_issues.issue: Error overlay intercepting pointer events preventing some UI interactions

passed_tests: Backend Update Order Status endpoint (200 OK)
Frontend Dashboard page loads with correct UI elements
Frontend Statistics cards display (Ordini Totali, In Attesa, In Produzione, Incasso Oggi)
Frontend 'Simula Ordine WP' button clickable and shows success toast
Frontend Navigation to Orders page works
Frontend Kanban board displays with correct columns (Ricevuti, In Produzione, Pronti, Completati)
Frontend Navigation to Inventory page works
Frontend Inventory table populated with 5 ingredients (auto-seed working)
Frontend Inventory table shows correct headers and ingredient data

success_percentage.frontend_ui: 90% (UI loads correctly, navigation works, components render)
success_percentage.frontend_integration: 0% (API calls blocked by mixed content policy)

action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix mixed content security issue - frontend is making HTTP requests to backend APIs while served over HTTPS. The REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL environment variable is correctly set to HTTPS, but axios is still making HTTP requests. This prevents all API integration from working.
